---
title: Execution Access Guide
summary: What access may be required to execute actions, the preferred permissions-based approach, and how access can be revoked.
order: 5
---

# MarketForge Execution Access & Permissions Guide

## Overview

MarketForge operates as an extension of your team.

To execute actions, access to certain platforms may be required.

---

## Preferred Method

Use **user permissions**, not passwords.

---

## If Credentials Are Used

* used only for execution
* limited access
* not retained longer than necessary

---

## Access Duration

Access is maintained only while needed.

---

## Removal

Access can be revoked at any time.

MarketForge will remove credentials upon:

* cancellation
* request
* automation transition

---

## Summary

Access is handled responsibly, securely, and only as needed.
